---
title: "v7-unified-masked-multitask-740"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

# Setup

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

EXP = Path(".").resolve()
M = json.loads((EXP / "metrics.json").read_text()) if (EXP / "metrics.json").exists() else None
M
```

# Probe trajectories

```{python}
import json
phist_path = EXP / "probe_suite_history_v7_unified.json"
if phist_path.exists():
    rows = [json.loads(l) for l in phist_path.read_text().splitlines() if l.strip()]
    epochs = [r["epoch"] for r in rows]
    results = {k: [r["results"][k] for r in rows] for k in rows[0]["results"].keys()}
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 5))
    for k, vs in results.items():
        ax.plot(epochs, vs, marker=".", label=k)
    ax.set_xlabel("epoch")
    ax.set_ylabel("probe value")
    ax.legend(fontsize=8)
    ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
    plt.show()
```

# Adaptive sampling distribution

```{python}
ahist_path = EXP / "adaptive_sampling_history_v7_unified.json"
if ahist_path.exists():
    rows = [json.loads(l) for l in ahist_path.read_text().splitlines() if l.strip()]
    if rows:
        first = rows[0]["snapshot"]["probs_after"]
        last = rows[-1]["snapshot"]["probs_after"]
        scenarios = list(first.keys())
        x = np.arange(len(scenarios))
        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 4))
        ax.bar(x - 0.2, [first[s] for s in scenarios], width=0.4, label="first")
        ax.bar(x + 0.2, [last[s] for s in scenarios], width=0.4, label="last")
        ax.set_xticks(x); ax.set_xticklabels(scenarios, rotation=30, ha="right")
        ax.legend(); ax.set_ylabel("sample prob"); ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
        plt.show()
```
